release_notes: Two new professional, branded PDF reports on the **Reports** tab, shown only when the **Phones** module is enabled:; **📱 Phone Inventory** — every IMEI-tracked unit grouped by brand, with model / IMEI / storage / condition / battery / buy / sell and a colour-coded status badge (IN STOCK / SOLD / RESERVED). KPI header (total units, in stock, sold, **stock value at cost**, avg battery) and a grand-total bar.; **💸 Phones Sold** — sold-unit history for the selected date range (sold-on, brand, model, IMEI, sale price, note) with revenue / avg-sale-price KPIs.
